name: deploy_web_file
description: Deploys a web file (HTML, JS, CSS) to the PASOE web root. Accepts base64-encoded content in file_content to safely handle UTF-8 including Norwegian characters and emojis. Decodes with BASE64-DECODE and writes with COPY-LOB NO-CONVERT.

file_content.description: Base64-encoded UTF-8 file content. Encode with btoa() in JavaScript or base64 in any language.
